{{Infobox group
| name = Wolf Division
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Wolf Division Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf]] Division is a specialized branch of the [[Abidan]] composed of warriors who focus on combat and martial excellence. Members of this division train to use the [[Way]] to strengthen their fighting abilities, honing themselves into highly effective instruments of battle. The division is led by [[Razael]], also known as the [[Wolf]], a powerful figure capable of executing high-level threats and [[Judges]]. The division possesses various destructive capabilities that remain largely unrecorded by the public, and its fighters are capable of engaging opponents who possess mountain-leveling strength. Historically, the division has suffered significant losses, including a major battle that resulted in the death of a previous [[Razael]] and the loss of four hundred members. While highly skilled, the division is noted for having a contentious relationship with the [[Reaper Division]].}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Wolf Division]] contains many destructive powers that are not public record.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Wolf Division]] is an [[Abidan]] division.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|As one of the [[Abidan]] divisions, the [[Wolf]] Division serves as a combat-oriented unit. The division operates out of a training compound that houses hundreds of recruits. Within this facility, the group utilizes a device capable of materializing items. Despite their martial nature, [[Jek’nan]] has no reason to fear this specific division.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf Division]] is one of the [[Abidan]] divisions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek’nan]] has no reason to fear the [[Wolf Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf Division]] is a combat-oriented [[Abidan]] division.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf Division]] is a training compound containing hundreds of recruits.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf Division]] is an [[Abidan]] division.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Wolf Division]] had a device that materializes items.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
